nasb.text: The eighth for the eighth month was Sibbecai the Hushathite of the Zerahites; and in his division were 24,000.

esv.text: Eighth, for the eighth month, was Sibbecai the Hushathite, of the Zerahites; in his division were 24,000.

cnv.text: 八月第八班的軍長是謝拉家族戶沙人西比該，他那一班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 谢拉族的户沙人西比该负责第八班，在八月当值，他班内有两万四千人。
